main module¶

class main.PersonalPlannerApp(**kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: MDApp

Main application class for the Personal Planner app.

Responsible for: - Initializing the database - Configuring the application theme - Setting up screen navigation

build()[source]¶

Builds and returns the root widget of the application.

Initializes: - App theme - Database connection - ScreenManager and all screens

Personal Planer
